message: chore(beads): close bd-3wep and add bd-vbgo

files.patch:
@@ -128,7 +128,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-3pf.9","title":"Create test fixtures, golden files, and mock backend infrastructure","description":"Central test infrastructure that other test beads depend on.

DIRECTORY STRUCTURE:
tests/
├── fixtures/
│   ├── audio/
│   │   ├── test_1s_tone.wav          (1s synthetic tone, generated by build script)
│   │   ├── test_10s_speech.wav       (10s synthetic speech-like patterns)
│   │   └── test_silence.wav          (1s silence for edge case testing)
│   ├── golden/
│   │   ├── whisper_cpp_output.json   (real whisper-cli output for test audio)
│   │   ├── insanely_fast_output.json (real insanely-fast output)
│   │   ├── diarization_output.srt    (real diarization SRT)
│   │   ├── diarization_output.txt    (real diarization transcript)
│   │   ├── robot_events.ndjson       (golden robot mode output)
│   │   └── tty_frames.ndjson         (golden TTY audio frames)
│   └── schemas/
│       └── robot_event_schema.json   (JSON Schema for robot events)
├── mocks/
│   ├── mock_whisper_cpp.sh           (echo golden JSON to output path)
│   ├── mock_insanely_fast.sh         (echo golden JSON to output path)
│   └── mock_diarization.py           (write golden SRT + TXT)
├── helpers/
│   └── mod.rs                        (shared test utilities: temp dirs, DB setup, assertions)
└── e2e/
    └── (e2e test scripts)

TEST HELPERS (tests/helpers/mod.rs):
- create_test_db() → (RunStore, TempDir) with schema initialized
- create_test_report() → RunReport with all fields populated
- create_test_request() → TranscribeRequest with defaults
- assert_segments_match(actual, expected, tolerance_sec)
- assert_events_ordered(events) → verify monotonic seq
- setup_mock_backends() → set env vars pointing at mocks
- generate_test_wav(duration_secs, sample_rate) → TempFile

SYNTHETIC AUDIO GENERATION:
- Use pure Rust (no external tools for generation)
- Generate WAV header + PCM samples for known waveforms
- Ensure test audio is deterministic (seeded PRNG for noise)

GOLDEN FILE UPDATE PROCESS:
- cargo test -- --update-golden (flag for refreshing golden files from real backends)
- Version golden files alongside code
- CI always uses frozen golden files (no external backends)

LOGGING:
- Test setup logs: "Setting up test fixtures in {tmpdir}"
- Mock backends log: "Mock whisper_cpp called with args: {args}"
- Assertions log: "Comparing {actual_path} against {golden_path}"

## Acceptance Criteria
- Test fixtures directory contains: synthetic test audio files, golden backend outputs, robot event golden files, TTY frame golden files, JSON Schema files
- Mock backend scripts return golden output
- Test helper functions: create_test_db, create_test_report, setup_mock_backends, assert_segments_match
- Fixtures are deterministic (generated from seed, not captured)
- All fixture files are version-controlled.","acceptance_criteria":"Test fixtures directory contains: synthetic test audio files, golden backend outputs, robot event golden files, TTY frame golden files, JSON Schema files. Mock backend scripts return golden output. Test helper functions: create_test_db, create_test_report, setup_mock_backends, assert_segments_match. Fixtures are deterministic (generated from seed, not captured).  {"id":"bd-3u5w","title":"Call ensure_runs_replay_column() from RunStore::open() migration chain","description":"ensure_runs_replay_column() at storage.rs:1060 is a migration helper that adds the replay_json column to the runs table, but it is marked #[allow(dead_code)] and not called from RunStore::open(). Legacy databases missing this column won't be auto-upgraded. Wire it into the open() migration sequence.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-02-27T21:13:32.548995597Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T21:14:57.119632540Z","closed_at":"2026-02-27T21:14:57.119609657Z","close_reason":"Not needed: the replay_json column is already handled by the v2 migration in apply_migration(2) which calls migrate_legacy_runs_schema_v2(). ensure_runs_replay_column() is a convenience wrapper that is correctly dead code.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
